rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs Motion For New Trial, And Motion To Vacate Judgement, And Enter New Judgement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF COLBY LAM Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs Motion For New Trial, And Motion To Vacate Judgement, And Enter New Judgement is continued to February 21, 2020. By no later than February 18, 2020 moving party to submit a supplemental brief re: Court's jurisdiction in light of the notice of appeal filed on January 30, 2020. Parties to provide courtesy copies of all papers in support of an in opposition to this motion by February 18, 2020 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. SANTOS & URRUTIA ASSOCIATES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records Filed In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT SANTOS & URRUTIA ASSOCIATES, INC., RODRIGO SANTOS, ALBERT URRUTIA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records Filed In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is CONTINUED to March 12, 2020. Defendants must provide the Court with courtesy copies of the Complaint and Exhibits 76 - 92 by February 28, 2020. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL O'GRADY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required. Plaintiff has two options: (1) The Court will rule on the demurrer at this time based on the pleadings before the Court; or (2) the Court will continue the trial to provide Plaintiff with an opportunity to file an opposition to the demurrer no later than February 26, 2020 with a hearing on March 2, 2020. =(501/SKF)
